explanation_box.text: The reptile appears to be lively and healthy, eyes are bright, and the timing of the breeding for the season was good!
This reptile does not appear to be as bright. It seems to lack the energy needed to help in the breeding process
This reptile received such a low score due to its inability to reproduce during a critical mating period.
The reptile received a standard fertility score due to its ability to mate and provide nourishment to its offspring during the time of year it was conceived
This reptile received a low fertility score due to the lack of effort and ability to create a healthy environment for growth of offspring
This reptile gained a fertility score of 7 due to its energy, overall brightness, and ability to maintain a steady environment for possible offspring
This reptile received a really low score due to the lack of overall health, strength, and endurance.
This reptile was able to create a so-called perfect environment for offspring to grow and thrive that just happened to line up with a perfect mating season
This reptile created the most ideal environment for offspring to thrive- they picked an ideal habitat, and their bodies were in peak health so they could properly produce offspring
This reptile gained a reputable fertility score of 7 by keeping its own health in line as well as timing the mating season adequately enough to ensure some offspring
This reptile only received a fertility score of 3 due to its overall lack of nutrients, energy, and inability to time the mating season
This reptile did a standard job; it was able to mate, and create/produce an adequate number of offspring
This reptile did just a step better than the one before at keeping its own health in a good condition, and somewhat timing the mating season along with providing a stable environment to thrive
This reptile received a 6 since it had some ability to time the mating season and help offspring grow
This reptile received a score of 3 because it did not factor the timing involved with the mating season adequately
This reptile received a score of 4 because it lacked the general knowledge of timing with the correct mating conditions, and it only had a substandard way of keeping offspring healthy

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they had ROUND feet or POINTY, CURLY feet. Did having CURLY/POINTY or ROUND feet make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did foot shape matter to the fertility of reptiles?

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they were GREEN or RED. Did being GREEN or RED make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did color matter to the fertility of reptiles?
